Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Red Dragon
Tinker Bell Fairy Mace

When attacking, has a 30-33% chance of stunning an enemy for 2,5 sec.
Once in a while, for 5 sec, every second, deals physical damage to a random enemy equal to 15% of that enemy's max health. The mace owner restores 120% health of the damage dealt and has a 60% chance to gain a shield that absorbs damage equal to 150% of the damage dealt. The shield lasts for up to 3 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
